zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Pêeche於大約1339年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親Gilbert de Pêche IV36歲，母親Joan de Weyland41歲。她於1365年9月13日與John Aspale在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1406年8月8日在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Pêeche于大约1339年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲Gilbert de Pêche IV36岁，母亲Joan de Weyland41岁。她于1365年9月13日与John Aspale在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1406年8月8日在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pêeche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Pêeche was born about 1339, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert de Pêche IV, was 36 and her mother, Joan de Weyland, was 41. She married John Aspale on 13 September 1365, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 8 August 1406, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Pêeche est née environ 1339, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Pêche IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan de Weyland, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Aspale le 13 septembre 1365, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1406, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

September 1365 in Suffolk, England John Aspale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. August 1406 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato John Aspale il 13 settembre 1365, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 agosto 1406, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Pêecheが約1339年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Pêche IVは36歳，母Joan de Weylandは41歳であった。1365年9月13日にイギリススフォルクでJohn Aspaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1406年8月8日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Pêeche(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Pêche IV(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Weyland(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1365년 9월 13일 영국 수폴크에서 John Aspale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 8월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Pêeche nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Pêche IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Weyland, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com John Aspale em 13 de setembro de 1365, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1406, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ro.Great Bealings, Suffolk, England: Great Bealings, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Pêeche родилась около 1339 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Pêche IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Weyland, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Aspale 13 сентября 1365 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 августа 1406 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.
